prompt: Emails from my welcome-book-magnet sequence in InfluencerSoft are landing in spam. What should I check first?

assertions.text: Mentions corporate-domain sender requirement (free domains like Gmail/Yahoo get DMARC-rejected)
Mentions sender confirmation — that new sender emails are dead until the IS confirmation link is clicked
Mentions DKIM, SPF, AND DMARC DNS records (all three; not just 'DNS records')
Includes the FBL gotcha: the FBL mailbox MUST be brand-new (IS auto-deletes incoming mail). This is the most consequential deliverability mistake.
Mentions Tech Tuesday or support@influencersoft.com escalation path
Points the user to a specific menu path (e.g., Campaigns → Settings, or Campaigns → Analytics) rather than only generic advice
